name: What's done is Done
short_description: A narrative-driven puzzle game about souls and forgetting. On the brink of reincarnation, she loses all her memories, and her soul is scattered. The memories of lingering spirits on the bridge seem to be connected to her story...
detailed_description:
players assume the role of a ghost on the brink of reincarnation. However, due to unforeseen circumstances, her soul becomes trapped, seized by malevolent spirits lurking beneath a bridge. To reclaim the fragments of her own soul and achieve wholeness for the cycle of rebirth, she must fulfill the unfinished desires of these three malevolent spirits. In the process of aiding them, the protagonist gradually uncovers memories of her past life, as well as the true identities of the three vengeful spirits.

In this game, you play as a wandering spirit who has lost all memories. Through step-by-step puzzle-solving, you gradually uncover the story, regain her memories and soul fragments, and enter the cycle of reincarnation.
· In this story-driven side-scrolling puzzle game, complete NPC tasks to gradually enrich the storyline.
· In multiple linear puzzle scenarios, find the story that belongs to her.
·Experience an immersive puzzle-solving journey with hand-drawn environments and atmospheric music.

Have Fun!
